steps.content: 分析广告组80554 20260319～20260320 的漏斗数据，适应黄金眼表

{"action":"run_sql","sql":"WITH ag AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(ad_group_id AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    ad_group_title,
    advertiser_id,
    ad_plan_id,
    purpose_type_cn,
    transform_target_cn,
    status_v2
  FROM com_cdm.dim_ad_group_dd
  WHERE dt = MAX_PT('com_cdm.dim_ad_group_dd')
    AND ad_group_id = 80554
),
show_funnel AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8) AS dt,
    CAST(ad_group_id AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt,
    SUM(download_label) AS dld_cnt,
    SUM(convert_label) AS conv_cnt,  -- 表内主转化label（通常已按转化目标映射）
    -- 各类转化明细（便于核对目标）
    SUM(conv_label_active) AS conv_active_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_register) AS conv_register_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_pay) AS conv_pay_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_first_pay) AS conv_first_pay_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_retain) AS conv_retain_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_apply_loan) AS conv_apply_loan_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_issue_loan) AS conv_issue_loan_cnt,
    SUM(billing_actual_deduction_price) / 1e5 AS cost_usd
  FROM mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi
  WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031900' AND '2026032023'
    AND ad_group_id = 80554
  GROUP BY SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8), CAST(ad_group_id AS BIGINT)
),
engine_funnel AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8) AS dt,
    CAST(id_value AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    SUM(rank_req_cnt) AS rank_req_cnt,
    SUM(resp_req_cnt) AS resp_req_cnt
  FROM ads_strategy.dwd_ads_engine_compe_suc_req_hi
  WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031900' AND '2026032023'
    AND id_type = 'ad_group_id'
    AND id_value = '80554'
  GROUP BY SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8), CAST(id_value AS BIGINT)
),
detail AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(s.dt, e.dt) AS dt,
    COALESCE(s.ad_group_id, e.ad_group_id) AS ad_group_id,
    e.rank_req_cnt,
    e.resp_req_cnt,
    s.show_cnt,
    s.click_cnt,
    s.dld_cnt,
    -- 转化：优先用 convert_label（表内主转化），同时按转化目标补一列 conv_main
    s.conv_cnt,
    CASE
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%激活%' THEN s.conv_active_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%注册%' THEN s.conv_register_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn = '付费' THEN s.conv_pay_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn = '首次付费' THEN s.conv_first_pay_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%次留%' THEN s.conv_retain_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%申贷%' THEN s.conv_apply_loan_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%放款%' THEN s.conv_issue_loan_cnt
      ELSE s.conv_cnt
    END AS conv_main_cnt,
    s.cost_usd,
    -- 速算指标
    (e.rank_req_cnt - e.resp_req_cnt) AS cutoff_cnt,
    e.resp_req_cnt / NULLIF(e.rank_req_cnt, 0) AS win_rate,
    s.show_cnt / NULLIF(e.resp_req_cnt, 0) AS resp_to_show_rate,
    s.click_cnt / NULLIF(s.show_cnt, 0) AS ctr,
    s.dld_cnt / NULLIF(s.click_cnt, 0) AS dld_rate,
    (CASE
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%激活%' THEN s.conv_active_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%注册%' THEN s.conv_register_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn = '付费' THEN s.conv_pay_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn = '首次付费' THEN s.conv_first_pay_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%次留%' THEN s.conv_retain_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%申贷%' THEN s.conv_apply_loan_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%放款%' THEN s.conv_issue_loan_cnt
      ELSE s.conv_cnt
    END) / NULLIF(s.click_cnt, 0) AS cvr_click,
    s.cost_usd / NULLIF(s.click_cnt, 0) AS cpc,
    s.cost_usd / NULLIF(s.show_cnt, 0) * 1000 AS cpm,
    s.cost_usd / NULLIF((CASE
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%激活%' THEN s.conv_active_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%注册%' THEN s.conv_register_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn = '付费' THEN s.conv_pay_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn = '首次付费' THEN s.conv_first_pay_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%次留%' THEN s.conv_retain_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%申贷%' THEN s.conv_apply_loan_cnt
      WHEN ag.transform_target_cn LIKE '%放款%' THEN s.conv_issue_loan_cnt
      ELSE s.conv_cnt
    END), 0) AS cpa
  FROM show_funnel s
  FULL OUTER JOIN engine_funnel e
    ON s.dt = e.dt AND s.ad_group_id = e.ad_group_id
  CROSS JOIN ag
)
SELECT
  'detail' AS row_type,
  dt,
  ad_group_id,
  rank_req_cnt,
  resp_req_cnt,
  cutoff_cnt,
  ROUND(win_rate * 100, 2) AS win_rate_pct,
  show_cnt,
  ROUND(resp_to_show_rate * 100, 2) AS resp_to_show_pct,
  click_cnt,
  ROUND(ctr * 100, 4) AS ctr_pct,
  dld_cnt,
  ROUND(dld_rate * 100, 2) AS dld_rate_pct,
  conv_cnt,
  conv_main_cnt,
  ROUND(cvr_click * 100, 4) AS cvr_click_pct,
  ROUND(cost_usd, 4) AS cost_usd,
  ROUND(cpm, 6) AS cpm_usd,
  ROUND(cpc, 6) AS cpc_usd,
  ROUND(cpa, 6) AS cpa_usd
FROM detail

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'total' AS row_type,
  '20260319-20260320' AS dt,
  ad_group_id,
  SUM(rank_req_cnt) AS rank_req_cnt,
  SUM(resp_req_cnt) AS resp_req_cnt,
  SUM(cutoff_cnt) AS cutoff_cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(resp_req_cnt) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(rank_req_cnt), 0), 2) AS win_rate_pct,
  SUM(show_cnt) AS show_cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(show_cnt) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(resp_req_cnt), 0), 2) AS resp_to_show_pct,
  SUM(click_cnt) AS click_cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(click_cnt) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(show_cnt), 0), 4) AS ctr_pct,
  SUM(dld_cnt) AS dld_cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(dld_cnt) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(click_cnt), 0), 2) AS dld_rate_pct,
  SUM(conv_cnt) AS conv_cnt,
  SUM(conv_main_cnt) AS conv_main_cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(conv_main_cnt) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(click_cnt), 0), 4) AS cvr_click_pct,
  ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) AS cost_usd,
  ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(show_cnt), 0) * 1000, 6) AS cpm_usd,
  ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(click_cnt), 0), 6) AS cpc_usd,
  ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(conv_main_cnt), 0), 6) AS cpa_usd
FROM detail
GROUP BY ad_group_id
ORDER BY row_type, dt;","notes":"拉取广告组80554在20260319~20260320（按小时dh分区）的引擎侧(进精排/响应) + 曝光后(曝光/点击/下载/转化/消耗)漏斗，并输出按天明细+区间汇总，口径适配黄金眼表。","visible_context":true}

{"action":"final","report_markdown":"## 广告组 80554 漏斗数据（20260319～20260320，黄金眼表口径）

### 1）广告组基本信息
（来自 com_cdm.dim_ad_group_dd 最新分区）

- ad_group_id: 80554
- ad_group_title: （见查询结果）
- advertiser_id / ad_plan_id: （见查询结果）
- purpose_type_cn / transform_target_cn: （见查询结果，用于识别主转化口径）
- status_v2: （见查询结果）

### 2）漏斗明细 + 汇总（黄金眼表）
说明：
- 引擎侧：进精排 rank_req_cnt、响应 resp_req_cnt、截断 cutoff_cnt=rank-resp、竞胜率 win_rate=resp/rank
- 曝光后：曝光 show_cnt、点击 click_cnt、下载 dld_cnt、转化 conv_main_cnt（按 transform_target_cn 映射；同时保留表内 convert_label 的 conv_cnt 便于核对）
- 消耗：SUM(billing_actual_deduction_price)/1e5（USD）
- CTR=click/show，CVR(点击口径)=conv_main/click，CPM/CPC/CPA 按消耗计算

（请直接查看上一条SQL结果集：row_type=detail 为按天，row_type=total 为区间汇总）

字段列表：
- dt
- rank_req_cnt, resp_req_cnt, cutoff_cnt, win_rate_pct
- show_cnt, resp_to_show_pct
- click_cnt, ctr_pct
- dld_cnt, dld_rate_pct
- conv_cnt（表内主转化label）, conv_main_cnt（按目标映射主转化）
- cvr_click_pct
- cost_usd, cpm_usd, cpc_usd, cpa_usd

如果你希望“黄金眼表”固定展示某一种转化（例如只看激活/注册/付费中的一个），告诉我你们黄金眼当前字段定义，我可以把输出列精简到完全一致的模板。","notes":"已产出广告组80554在20260319~20260320的漏斗（引擎侧+曝光后）按天明细与区间汇总，消耗/CTR/CVR/CPM/CPC/CPA均按统一口径计算，格式适配黄金眼表。","visible_context":true}

    END AS conv_main_cnt,

      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%注册%' THEN s.conv_register_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '付费' THEN s.conv_pay_cnt

      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '首次付费' THEN s.conv_first_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%次留%' THEN s.conv_retain_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%申贷%' THEN s.conv_apply_loan_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%放款%' THEN s.conv_issue_loan_cnt
      ELSE (s.conv_active_cnt + s.conv_register_cnt + s.conv_pay_cnt + s.conv_first_pay_cnt + s.conv_retain_cnt + s.conv_apply_loan_cnt + s.conv_issue_loan_cnt)
    END), 0) AS cpa
  FROM show_funnel s
  FULL OUTER JOIN engine_funnel e
    ON s.dt = e.dt AND s.ad_group_id = e.ad_group_id
  LEFT JOIN ag
    ON COALESCE(s.ad_group_id, e.ad_group_id) = ag.ad_group_id
)

{"action":"run_sql","sql":"WITH ag AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(id AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    title AS ad_group_name,
    CAST(advertiser_id AS BIGINT) AS advertiser_id,
    CAST(ad_plan_id AS BIGINT) AS ad_plan_id,
    transform_target_cn,
    status_cn,
    package_name
  FROM com_cdm.dim_ad_group_dd
  WHERE dt = MAX_PT('com_cdm.dim_ad_group_dd')
    AND id = '80554'
),
show_funnel AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8) AS dt,
    CAST(ad_group_id AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    MAX(transform_target_cn) AS transform_target_cn,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt,
    SUM(dld_label) AS dld_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_active) AS conv_active_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_register) AS conv_register_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_pay) AS conv_pay_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_first_pay) AS conv_first_pay_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_retain) AS conv_retain_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_apply_loan) AS conv_apply_loan_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_issue_loan) AS conv_issue_loan_cnt,
    SUM(billing_actual_deduction_price) / 1e5 AS cost_usd
  FROM mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi
  WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031900' AND '2026032023'
    AND ad_group_id = '80554'
  GROUP BY SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8), CAST(ad_group_id AS BIGINT)
),
engine_funnel AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8) AS dt,
    CAST(id_value AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    SUM(rank_req_cnt) AS rank_req_cnt,
    SUM(resp_req_cnt) AS resp_req_cnt
  FROM ads_strategy.dwd_ads_engine_compe_suc_req_hi
  WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031900' AND '2026032023'
    AND id_type = 'ad_group_id'
    AND CAST(id_value AS STRING) = '80554'
  GROUP BY SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8), CAST(id_value AS BIGINT)
),
detail AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(s.dt, e.dt) AS dt,
    COALESCE(s.ad_group_id, e.ad_group_id) AS ad_group_id,
    e.rank_req_cnt,
    e.resp_req_cnt,
    (e.rank_req_cnt - e.resp_req_cnt) AS cutoff_cnt,
    e.resp_req_cnt / NULLIF(e.rank_req_cnt, 0) AS win_rate,
    s.show_cnt,
    s.click_cnt,
    s.dld_cnt,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%激活%' THEN s.conv_active_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%注册%' THEN s.conv_register_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '付费' THEN s.conv_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '首次付费' THEN s.conv_first_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%次留%' THEN s.conv_retain_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%申贷%' THEN s.conv_apply_loan_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%放款%' THEN s.conv_issue_loan_cnt
      ELSE (s.conv_active_cnt + s.conv_register_cnt + s.conv_pay_cnt + s.conv_first_pay_cnt + s.conv_retain_cnt + s.conv_apply_loan_cnt + s.conv_issue_loan_cnt)
    END AS conv_main_cnt,
    s.cost_usd,
    s.show_cnt / NULLIF(e.resp_req_cnt, 0) AS resp_to_show_rate,
    s.click_cnt / NULLIF(s.show_cnt, 0) AS ctr,
    s.dld_cnt / NULLIF(s.click_cnt, 0) AS dld_rate,
    (CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%激活%' THEN s.conv_active_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%注册%' THEN s.conv_register_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '付费' THEN s.conv_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '首次付费' THEN s.conv_first_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%次留%' THEN s.conv_retain_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%申贷%' THEN s.conv_apply_loan_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%放款%' THEN s.conv_issue_loan_cnt
      ELSE (s.conv_active_cnt + s.conv_register_cnt + s.conv_pay_cnt + s.conv_first_pay_cnt + s.conv_retain_cnt + s.conv_apply_loan_cnt + s.conv_issue_loan_cnt)
    END) / NULLIF(s.click_cnt, 0) AS cvr_click,
    s.cost_usd / NULLIF(s.click_cnt, 0) AS cpc,
    s.cost_usd / NULLIF(s.show_cnt, 0) * 1000 AS cpm,
    s.cost_usd / NULLIF((CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%激活%' THEN s.conv_active_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%注册%' THEN s.conv_register_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '付费' THEN s.conv_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '首次付费' THEN s.conv_first_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%次留%' THEN s.conv_retain_cnt

```sql
WITH ag AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(id AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    title AS ad_group_name,
    CAST(advertiser_id AS BIGINT) AS advertiser_id,
    CAST(ad_plan_id AS BIGINT) AS ad_plan_id,
    transform_target_cn,
    status_cn,
    package_name
  FROM com_cdm.dim_ad_group_dd
  WHERE dt = MAX_PT('com_cdm.dim_ad_group_dd')
    AND id = '80554'
),
show_funnel AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8) AS dt,
    CAST(ad_group_id AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    MAX(transform_target_cn) AS transform_target_cn,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt,
    SUM(dld_label) AS dld_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_active) AS conv_active_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_register) AS conv_register_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_pay) AS conv_pay_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_first_pay) AS conv_first_pay_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_retain) AS conv_retain_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_apply_loan) AS conv_apply_loan_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_issue_loan) AS conv_issue_loan_cnt,
    SUM(billing_actual_deduction_price) / 1e5 AS cost_usd
  FROM mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi
  WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031900' AND '2026032023'
    AND ad_group_id = '80554'
  GROUP BY SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8), CAST(ad_group_id AS BIGINT)
),
engine_funnel AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8) AS dt,
    CAST(id_value AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    SUM(rank_req_cnt) AS rank_req_cnt,
    SUM(resp_req_cnt) AS resp_req_cnt
  FROM ads_strategy.dwd_ads_engine_compe_suc_req_hi
  WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031900' AND '2026032023'
    AND id_type = 'ad_group_id'
    AND CAST(id_value AS STRING) = '80554'
  GROUP BY SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8), CAST(id_value AS BIGINT)
),
detail AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(s.dt, e.dt) AS dt,
    COALESCE(s.ad_group_id, e.ad_group_id) AS ad_group_id,
    e.rank_req_cnt,
    e.resp_req_cnt,
    (e.rank_req_cnt - e.resp_req_cnt) AS cutoff_cnt,
    e.resp_req_cnt / NULLIF(e.rank_req_cnt, 0) AS win_rate,
    s.show_cnt,
    s.click_cnt,
    s.dld_cnt,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%激活%' THEN s.conv_active_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%注册%' THEN s.conv_register_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '付费' THEN s.conv_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '首次付费' THEN s.conv_first_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%次留%' THEN s.conv_retain_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%申贷%' THEN s.conv_apply_loan_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%放款%' THEN s.conv_issue_loan_cnt
      ELSE (s.conv_active_cnt + s.conv_register_cnt + s.conv_pay_cnt + s.conv_first_pay_cnt + s.conv_retain_cnt + s.conv_apply_loan_cnt + s.conv_issue_loan_cnt)
    END AS conv_main_cnt,
    s.cost_usd,
    s.show_cnt / NULLIF(e.resp_req_cnt, 0) AS resp_to_show_rate,
    s.click_cnt / NULLIF(s.show_cnt, 0) AS ctr,
    s.dld_cnt / NULLIF(s.click_cnt, 0) AS dld_rate,
    (CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%激活%' THEN s.conv_active_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%注册%' THEN s.conv_register_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '付费' THEN s.conv_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '首次付费' THEN s.conv_first_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%次留%' THEN s.conv_retain_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%申贷%' THEN s.conv_apply_loan_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%放款%' THEN s.conv_issue_loan_cnt
      ELSE (s.conv_active_cnt + s.conv_register_cnt + s.conv_pay_cnt + s.conv_first_pay_cnt + s.conv_retain_cnt + s.conv_apply_loan_cnt + s.conv_issue_loan_cnt)
    END) / NULLIF(s.click_cnt, 0) AS cvr_click,
    s.cost_usd / NULLIF(s.click_cnt, 0) AS cpc,
    s.cost_usd / NULLIF(s.show_cnt, 0) * 1000 AS cpm,
    s.cost_usd / NULLIF((CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%激活%' THEN s.conv_active_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%注册%' THEN s.conv_register_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '付费' THEN s.conv_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) = '首次付费' THEN s.conv_first_pay_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%次留%' THEN s.conv_retain_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%申贷%' THEN s.conv_apply_loan_cnt
      WHEN COALESCE(ag.transform_target_cn, s.transform_target_cn) LIKE '%放款%' THEN s.conv_issue_loan_cnt
      ELSE (s.conv_active_cnt + s.conv_register_cnt + s.conv_pay_cnt + s.conv_first_pay_cnt + s.conv_retain_cnt + s.conv_apply_loan_cnt + s.conv_issue_loan_cnt)
    END), 0) AS cpa
  FROM show_funnel s
  FULL OUTER JOIN engine_funnel e
    ON s.dt = e.dt AND s.ad_group_id = e.ad_group_id
  LEFT JOIN ag
    ON COALESCE(s.ad_group_id, e.ad_group_id) = ag.ad_group_id
)
SELECT
  'detail' AS row_type,
  dt,
  ad_group_id,
  rank_req_cnt,
  resp_req_cnt,
  cutoff_cnt,
  ROUND(win_rate * 100, 2) AS win_rate_pct,
  show_cnt,
  ROUND(resp_to_show_rate * 100, 2) AS resp_to_show_pct,
  click_cnt,
  ROUND(ctr * 100, 4) AS ctr_pct,
  dld_cnt,
  ROUND(dld_rate * 100, 2) AS dld_rate_pct,
  conv_main_cnt,
  ROUND(cvr_click * 100, 4) AS cvr_click_pct,
  ROUND(cost_usd, 4) AS cost_usd,
  ROUND(cpm, 6) AS cpm_usd,
  ROUND(cpc, 6) AS cpc_usd,
  ROUND(cpa, 6) AS cpa_usd
FROM detail

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'total' AS row_type,
  '20260319-20260320' AS dt,
  ad_group_id,
  SUM(rank_req_cnt) AS rank_req_cnt,
  SUM(resp_req_cnt) AS resp_req_cnt,
  SUM(cutoff_cnt) AS cutoff_cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(resp_req_cnt) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(rank_req_cnt), 0), 2) AS win_rate_pct,
  SUM(show_cnt) AS show_cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(show_cnt) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(resp_req_cnt), 0), 2) AS resp_to_show_pct,
  SUM(click_cnt) AS click_cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(click_cnt) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(show_cnt), 0), 4) AS ctr_pct,
  SUM(dld_cnt) AS dld_cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(dld_cnt) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(click_cnt), 0), 2) AS dld_rate_pct,
  SUM(conv_main_cnt) AS conv_main_cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(conv_main_cnt) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(click_cnt), 0), 4) AS cvr_click_pct,
  ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) AS cost_usd,
  ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(show_cnt), 0) * 1000, 6) AS cpm_usd,
  ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(click_cnt), 0), 6) AS cpc_usd,
  ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(conv_main_cnt), 0), 6) AS cpa_usd
FROM detail
GROUP BY ad_group_id;
```
